reviews.comment:
La querida estacion de servicio Aca es mi punto de encuentro con clientes dentro de alli con un servicio eficiente,baños limpios y cuidados y sobre todo eso de querer volver cada vez que salgo de Playa Grande al centro.Es mi lugar preferido. Ferni Deck de Deckservice Garmin

(Translated by Google)
The beloved Aca gas station is my go-to spot for meeting up with customers. Inside, I enjoy efficient service, clean and well-maintained restrooms, and above all, the feeling of wanting to return every time I leave Playa Grande for downtown. It's my favorite place. Ferni Deck of Deckservice Garmin
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5N2JUcU13EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion , super completo, se puede calibrar los neumáticos en cada totem de carga de nafta, los chicos de playa muy amables ,y la atencion en el serviclub excelente

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very complete, you can inflate the tires at each fuel pump, the guys on the beach are very friendly, and the service at the service club is excellent.
